artifact_summary: Title sheet for SCADA Standards Appendix A within the HFC AWTP Master Plan, dated January 2025.
artifact_blurb: This document serves as the official title page for 'SCADA Standards Appendix A,' a component of the HFC AWTP Master Plan published in January 2025. The page functions as a reference index for technical definitions and general standards, featuring embedded screenshots of specific data fields to illustrate the scope of the appendix.
